name: Swedish Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and powdered sugar until smooth.
2. Add flour, baking powder, and vanilla extract; mix well.
3. Roll dough into two logs and chill for at least 30 minutes.
4. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
5. Cut chilled rolls into 1/4-inch slices.
6. Place cookie slices on a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake for 10 minutes or until edges are lightly browned.
8. Cool cookies on a wire rack.
Frosting:
1. Melt butter and allow to cool slightly.
2. Gradually add powdered sugar, vanilla extract, and boiling water until smooth.
3. Spread frosting evenly over cooled cookies.
